info.title: Loops OpenAPI Spec
info.description: This is the OpenAPI Spec for the [Loops API](https://loops.so/docs/api).

post.description: Add a contact to your audience.

requestBody.description:
You can add custom contact properties as keys in this request (of type `string`, `number`, `boolean` or `date` ([see available date formats](https://loops.so/docs/contacts/properties#dates))).
Make sure to create the properties in Loops before using them in API calls.

put.description:
Update a contact by `email` or `userId`. You must provide one of these parameters.
If you want to update a contact’s email address, the contact will first need a `userId` value. You can then make a request containing the userId field along with an updated email address.

requestBody.description:
You can add custom contact properties as keys in this request (of type `string`, `number`, `boolean` or `date` ([see available date formats](https://loops.so/docs/contacts/properties#dates))).
Make sure to create the properties in Loops before using them in API calls.

get.description: Search for a contact by `email` or `userId`. Only one parameter is allowed.

200.description: List of contacts (or an empty array if no contact was found). Contact objects will include any custom properties.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. `email` and `userId` are both provided).

get.summary: Get suppression status for a contact
get.description: Retrieve suppression status and removal quota for a contact by `email` or `userId`. Include only one query parameter.

delete.summary: Remove a contact from suppression list
delete.description: Remove a suppressed contact from the suppression list by `email` or `userId`. Include only one query parameter.

400.description: Bad request (e.g. contact is not suppressed).

post.description: Add a contact property to your team.

requestBody.description: The name value must be in camelCase, like `planName`.

get.summary: Get a list of contact properties
get.description:
Retrieve a list of your account's contact properties.
Use the `list` parameter to query "all" or "custom" properties.
Retrieve a list of Loops' dedicated sending IP addresses.

schema.description: List of dedicated sending IP addresses

get.summary: Get a list of mailing lists
get.description: Retrieve a list of your account's mailing lists.

post.description: Send events to trigger emails in Loops.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Include a unique ID for this request (maximum 100 characters) to avoid duplicate events. [More info](https://loops.so/docs/api-reference/send-event#param-idempotency-key)

requestBody.description:
Provide either `email` or `userId` to identify the contact ([read more](https://loops.so/docs/api-reference/send-event#body)).
You can add event properties, which will be available in emails sent by this event. Values can be of type string, number, boolean or date ([see allowed date formats](https://loops.so/docs/events/properties#important-information-about-event-properties)).
Make sure to create the properties in Loops before using them in API calls.
You can add contact properties as keys in this request (of type `string`, `number`, `boolean` or `date` ([see available date formats](https://loops.so/docs/contacts/properties#dates))).

post.description:
Send a transactional email to a contact.
Please [email us](mailto:help@loops.so) to enable attachments on your account before using them with the API.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Include a unique ID for this request (maximum 100 characters) to avoid duplicate emails. [More info](https://loops.so/docs/api-reference/send-transactional-email#param-idempotency-key)

400.description: Bad request (e.g. transactional email is not published).

get.description: Get a list of published transactional emails.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: How many results to return in each request. Must be between 10 and 50. Default is 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A cursor, to return a specific page of results. Cursors can be found from the `pagination.nextCursor` value in each response.

get.description: Retrieve a single theme by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of email themes, most recently created first.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: How many results to return in each request. Must be between 10 and 50. Default is 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A cursor to return a specific page of results. Cursors can be found from the `pagination.nextCursor` value in each response.

get.description: Retrieve a single component by ID.
Retrieve a paginated list of email components.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: How many results to return in each request. Must be between 10 and 50. Default is 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A cursor to return a specific page of results. Cursors can be found from the `pagination.nextCursor` value in each response.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of campaigns.

parameters.name: perPage
parameters.description: How many results to return in each request. Must be between 10 and 50. Default is 20.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: A cursor to return a specific page of results. Cursors can be found from the `pagination.nextCursor` value in each response.

post.description: Create a new draft campaign. An empty email message is created automatically and its `emailMessageId` is returned. Use the `/email-messages/{emailMessageId}` endpoint to set subject, sender, preview text, and LMX content.

400.description: Invalid request body or no sending domain configured.

get.description: Retrieve a single campaign by ID.

post.description: Update a draft campaign's name. Campaigns can only be updated while in draft status.

409.description: Campaign is not in draft status.

get.description: Retrieve an email message, including its compiled LMX content.

400.description: Invalid `emailMessageId` or no sending domain configured.

409.description: Email message uses MJML format or content cannot be parsed.

post.description: Update fields on an email message (subject, preview text, sender, LMX content). The campaign must be in draft status. Supply `expectedRevisionId` matching the current `contentRevisionId` — the server rejects mismatched revisions with 409.

409.description: Campaign is not in draft status, `contentRevisionId` is stale, content cannot be parsed, or email message uses MJML format.

parameters.name: emailMessageId
parameters.description: The ID of the email message.

post.description: Request a pre-signed URL to upload an image asset. Upload the file with an HTTP `PUT` to the returned `presignedUrl` (sending the same `Content-Type` and `Content-Length`), then call `/uploads/{id}/complete` to finalize the asset.

413.description: Upload exceeds the maximum allowed size.

post.description: Finalize an asset after the file has been uploaded to the pre-signed URL. Returns the public URL of the uploaded asset.

400.description: Upload id is missing or the uploaded file has an unsupported content type.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The `emailAssetId` returned when the upload was created.

mailingLists.description: An object of mailing list IDs and boolean subscription statuses.
An object of mailing list IDs and boolean subscription statuses.
An object of mailing list IDs and boolean subscription statuses.

eventProperties.description: An object containing event property data for the event, available in emails sent by the event.

mailingLists.description: An object of mailing list IDs and boolean subscription statuses.

transactionalId.description: The ID of the transactional email to send.

addToAudience.description: If `true`, a contact will be created in your audience using the `email` value (if a matching contact doesn't already exist).

dataVariables.description: An object containing contact data as defined by the data variables added to the transactional email template.

filename.description: The name of the file, shown in email clients.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file.

data.description: The base64-encoded content of the file.

attachments.description: A list containing file objects to be sent along with an email message.

isDefault.description: Whether this theme is the team's default.

ThemeStyles.description: Flat map of style attributes, matching the attribute names accepted by the LMX `<Style />` tag. All attributes are returned with the values stored on the theme.

isDefault.description: Whether this theme is the team's default.

lmx.description: The component body serialized as LMX.
The component body serialized as LMX.

emailMessageId.description: The ID of the empty email message created for this campaign. Use `/email-messages/{emailMessageId}` to set its fields and LMX content.

emailMessageContentRevisionId.description: The `contentRevisionId` of the newly created email message. Pass this as `expectedRevisionId` on your first update.

expectedRevisionId.description: The `contentRevisionId` you last fetched. Used for optimistic concurrency — the request is rejected with 409 if the server's revision has advanced.

fromEmail.description: The sender username (without `@` or domain). The team's sending domain is appended automatically.

replyToEmail.description: Reply-to email. Must be empty or a valid email address.

lmx.description: The email body serialized as LMX. Styles must be embedded in the LMX `<Style />` tag.
The email body serialized as LMX.

contentRevisionId.description: The current content revision. Pass this as `expectedRevisionId` on your next update.

warnings.description: Non-fatal issues raised while compiling the submitted LMX. Only present on update responses when warnings were produced.

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file to upload. Supported types are `image/jpeg`, `image/png`, `image/gif` and `image/webp`.

contentLength.description: The size of the file in bytes. Must be a positive integer no greater than 4,000,000 bytes.

emailAssetId.description: The ID of the created asset. Pass this as `id` to `/uploads/{id}/complete` once the file has been uploaded.

presignedUrl.description: The pre-signed URL to upload the file to with an HTTP `PUT` request. Send the same `Content-Type` and `Content-Length` used in the create request.

finalUrl.description: The public URL of the uploaded asset.

maxUploads.description: The maximum number of uploads allowed per window.

windowHours.description: The number of hours in the upload limit window.

supportedContentTypes.description: Present when the request was rejected for an unsupported `contentType`. Lists the accepted MIME types.

maxBytes.description: Present when the upload exceeds the size limit. The maximum allowed size in bytes.

teamName.description: The name of the team the API key belongs to.

GetDedicatedSendingIps200.description: List of dedicated sending IP addresses

ExamplePayload.description: Placeholder schema for path example refs

tags.name: Email messages
tags.description: Manage email message content for campaigns
